CREATE TABLE test_dict (key VARCHAR(255), value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT dict_remove('key1') FROM test_dict WHERE key = 'key1';
SELECT dict_remove('key2') FROM test_dict WHERE key = 'key1';
SELECT dict_remove('key1') FROM test_dict WHERE key = 'key1';
SELECT dict_remove('key3') FROM test_dict WHERE key = 'key4';
SELECT dict_remove('key2') FROM test_dict WHERE key = 'key2' AND value = 'value2';
SELECT dict_remove('key4') FROM (SELECT key FROM test_dict) AS subquery WHERE key = 'key4';
SELECT dict_remove(NULL) FROM test_dict WHERE key IS NULL;
